channel.title: Zoom Communications, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Zoom Communications, Inc. (zoom).

item.title: CVE-2026-30906 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Untrusted search path in the installer for Zoom Rooms for Windows before version 7.0.0 may allow an authenticated user to enable an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2026-30905 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: External Control of File Name or Path in the Zoom Workplace VDI Plugin Windows Universal Installer before version 6.6.11 may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2026-30904 · 1.8 LOW
item.description: Protection Mechanism Failure in Zoom Workplace for iOS before version 7.0.0 may allow an authenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via physical access.

item.title: CVE-2026-30903 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: External Control of File Name or Path in the Mail feature of Zoom Workplace for Windows before 6.6.0 may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via network access.

item.title: CVE-2026-30902 · 7.8 HIGH — Zoom Clients for Windows - Improper Privilege Management
item.description: Improper Privilege Management in certain Zoom Clients for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2026-30901 · 7 HIGH — Zoom Rooms for Windows - Improper Input Validation
item.description: Improper Input Validation in Zoom Rooms for Windows before 6.6.5 in Kiosk Mode may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2026-30900 · 7.8 HIGH — Zoom Workplace Clients for Windows - Improper Check
item.description: Improper Check of minimum version in update functionality of certain Zoom Clients for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2026-22844 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Zoom Node Deployments - Command Injection
item.description: A Command Injection vulnerability in Zoom Node Multimedia Routers (MMRs) before version 5.2.1716.0 may allow a meeting participant to conduct remote code execution of the MMR via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-67460 · 7.8 HIGH — Zoom Rooms for Windows - Software Downgrade Protection Mechanism Failure
item.description: Protection Mechanism Failure of Software Downgrade in Zoom Rooms for Windows before 6.6.0 may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-67461 · 5 MEDIUM — Zoom Rooms for macOS - External Control of File Name or Path
item.description: External control of file name or path in Zoom Rooms for macOS before version 6.6.0 may allow an authenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-62484 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace Clients - Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity
item.description: Inefficient regular expression complexity in certain Zoom Workplace Clients before version 6.5.10 may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-62483 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Clients - Improper Removal of Sensitive Information
item.description: Improper removal of sensitive information in certain Zoom Clients before version 6.5.10 may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-62482 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace for Windows - Cross-site Scripting
item.description: Cross-site scripting in Zoom Workplace for Windows before version 6.5.10 may allow an unauthenticated user to impact integrity via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30662 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace VDI Plugin macOS Universal Installer - Symlink Following
item.description: Symlink following in the installer for the Zoom Workplace VDI Plugin macOS Universal installer before version 6.3.14, 6.4.14, and 6.5.10 in their respective tracks may allow an authenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network acc…

item.title: CVE-2025-30669 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Clients - Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: Improper certificate validation in certain Zoom Clients may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via adjacent access.

item.title: CVE-2025-64741 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace for Android - Improper Authorization Handling
item.description: Improper authorization handling in Zoom Workplace for Android before version 6.5.10 may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-64740 · 7.5 HIGH — Zoom Workplace VDI Client for Windows - Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature
item.description: Improper verification of cryptographic signature in the installer for Zoom Workplace VDI Client for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-64739 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Clients - External Control of File Name or Path
item.description: External control of file name or path in certain Zoom Clients may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-64738 · 5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace for macOS - External Control of File Name or Path
item.description: External control of file name or path in Zoom Workplace for macOS before version 6.5.10 may allow an authenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-58133 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Rooms Clients - Authentication Bypass
item.description: Authentication bypass in some Zoom Rooms Clients before version 6.5.1 may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-58132 · 4.1 MEDIUM — Zoom Clients for Windows - Command Injection
item.description: Command injection in some Zoom Clients for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-58131 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace VDI Plugin macOS Universal installer for VMware Horizon - Race Condition
item.description: Race condition in the Zoom Workplace VDI Plugin macOS Universal installer for VMware Horizon before version 6.4.10 (or before 6.2.15 and 6.3.12 in their respective tracks) may allow an authenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via net…

item.title: CVE-2025-58135 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace Clients for Windows - Improper Action Enforcement
item.description: Improper action enforcement in certain Zoom Workplace Clients for Windows may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-58134 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace Clients for Windows - Incorrect Authorization
item.description: Incorrect authorization in certain Zoom Workplace Clients for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct an impact to integrity via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49461 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace Clients - Cross-site Scripting
item.description: Cross-site scripting in certain Zoom Workplace Clients may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49460 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace Clients - Argument Injection
item.description: Uncontrolled resource consumption in certain Zoom Workplace Clients may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49459 · 7.8 HIGH — Zoom Workplace for Windows on ARM - Missing Authorization
item.description: Missing authorization in the installer for Zoom Workplace for Windows on ARM before version 6.5.0 may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49458 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Clients - Buffer Overflow
item.description: Buffer overflow in certain Zoom Workplace Clients may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49457 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Zoom Clients for Windows - Untrusted Search Path
item.description: Untrusted search path in certain Zoom Clients for Windows may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via network access

item.title: CVE-2025-49456 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Zoom Clients for Windows- Race Condition
item.description: Race condition in the installer for certain Zoom Clients for Windows may allow an unauthenticated user to impact application integrity via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49464 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Clients for Windows- Classic Buffer Overflow
item.description: Classic buffer overflow in certain Zoom Clients for Windows may allow an authorised user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49463 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Clients for iOS - Insufficient Control Flow Management
item.description: Insufficient control flow management in certain Zoom Clients for iOS before version 6.4.5 may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-49462 · 3.5 LOW — Zoom Clients - Cross-site Scripting
item.description: Cross-site scripting in certain Zoom Clients before version 6.4.5 may allow an authenticated user to conduct a disclosure of information via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-46789 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Clients for Windows - Classic Buffer Overflow
item.description: Classic buffer overflow in certain Zoom Clients for Windows may allow an authorized user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-46788 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace for Linux - Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: Improper certificate validation in Zoom Workplace for Linux before version 6.4.13 may allow an unauthorized user to conduct an information disclosure via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-46786 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Zoom Workplace Apps - Cross-site Scripting
item.description: Cross-site scripting in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an authenticated user to impact app integrity via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-46785 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows - Buffer Over-read
item.description: Buffer over-read in some Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30668 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps - NULL Pointer Dereference
item.description: Integer underflow in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30667 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps - NULL Pointer Dereference
item.description: NULL pointer dereference in some Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30666 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows - NULL Pointer Dereference
item.description: NULL pointer dereference in some Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30665 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows - NULL Pointer Dereference
item.description: NULL pointer dereference in some Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30664 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps - Cross-site Scripting
item.description: Cross-site scripting in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30663 · 8.8 HIGH — Zoom Workplace Apps - Time-of-check Time-of-use
item.description: Time-of-check time-of-use race condition in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30671 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows - Null Pointer
item.description: Null pointer dereference in some Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-30670 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows - Null Pointer
item.description: Null pointer dereference in some Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a denial of service via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-27443 · 2.8 LOW — Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows - Insecure Default Variable Initialization
item.description: Insecure default variable initialization in some Zoom Workplace Apps for Windows may allow an authenticated user to conduct a loss of integrity via local access.

item.title: CVE-2025-27442 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps - Cross Site Scripting
item.description: Cross site scripting in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a loss of integrity via adjacent network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-27441 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Zoom Workplace Apps - Cross Site Scripting
item.description: Cross site scripting in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an unauthenticated user to conduct a loss of integrity via adjacent network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-27440 · 8.5 HIGH — Zoom Apps - Heap-based Buffer Overflow
item.description: Heap overflow in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via network access.

item.title: CVE-2025-27439 · 8.5 HIGH — Zoom Apps - Buffer Underflow
item.description: Buffer underflow in some Zoom Workplace Apps may allow an authenticated user to conduct an escalation of privilege via network access.
